name: §6Ammonite
description:
§8Fishing Pet

§7Sea Creature Chance: §35

§6Heart of the Sea
§7Grants §3+1α Sea Creature Chance
§7to your pet for each §5Heart of the
§5Mountain §7level.

§6Expert Cave Fisher
§7Grants §9+0.5⚓ Double Hook Chance
§7for each §5Heart of the Mountain §7level
§7while in the §5Crystal Hollows§7.

§6Gift of the Ammonite
§7Each Mining and Fishing level grants
§b+0.5☂ Fishing Speed§7, §f+2✦ Speed
§7and §a+2❈ Defense§7.

§eRight-click to add this pet to your
§epet menu!

variants.name: Hermit Baked Beans Ammonite Skin
variants.lore:
§8Consumed on use

§7Pet skins change the look and
§7particle trail of your pet but only
§7one skin can be active at a time!

§7This skin can only be applied to
§aAmmonite§7 pets.

§eRight-click on your summoned pet to
§eapply this skin!
